settings.subtitle: Keratin + Argan Oil
settings.description: A smoothing hair serum designed to control frizz, protect against heat, and restore softness without weighing hair down. It seals moisture, enhances shine, and leaves hair silky, manageable, and smooth with every use.
settings.key_ingredients: Argan Oil, Wheat Germ Oil, Almond Oil, Olive Oil, Grapeseed Oil, Coconut Oil, Flaxseed Oil, Safflower Oil, Shea Butter, Squalene, Niacinamide.

settings.label: GOOD FOR:
settings.value: All hair types, especially dry and frizzy hair

settings.label: FEELS LIKE:
settings.value: A silky, weightless layer that glides through hair

settings.label: LOOKS LIKE:
settings.value: Sleek, shiny hair with controlled frizz

settings.label: SMELLS LIKE:
settings.value: Soft, fresh scent with a clean finish

settings.label: FYI:
settings.value: Non-Greasy • Lightweight Feel • Heat-Protective • No Buildup

settings.title: Intensive smoothing for SLEEK + SHINY, FRIZZ-FREE hair.
what's inside
settings.intro: A lightweight, smoothing hair serum that tames frizz, protects strands, and enhances shine without weighing hair down.
settings.footer_text:
ARGAN OIL
 nourishes and softens hair while reducing breakage
KERATIN COMPLEX
 strengthens hair fibers for smoother, frizz-free strands

also made with Wheat Germ Oil, Almond Oil, Olive Oil, Grapeseed Oil, Coconut Oil, Flaxseed Oil, Safflower Oil, Shea Butter, Squalene, Niacinamide

settings.description: SAID THEIR HAIR FELT SMOOTHER + MORE MANAGEABLE
SAID THEIR HAIR LOOKED SHINIER + HEALTHIER

settings.footnote: Based on a 2-week consumer perception study with consistent use.

settings.question: Can I use this serum on dry hair?
settings.answer: Yes, it works well on both damp and dry hair to control frizz and add shine.

settings.question: Will it make my hair greasy?
settings.answer: No, the formula is designed to be non-greasy and does not weigh hair down.

settings.question: Can I use it before heat styling?
settings.answer: Yes, it acts as a heat protectant and helps reduce damage from styling tools.

settings.question: Is it suitable for all hair types?
settings.answer: Yes, it works for all hair types, especially dry, frizzy, or damaged hair.

settings.question: How often should I use it?
settings.answer: You can use it daily or whenever your hair needs smoothness and control.

settings.title: FAQ
settings.subtitle: Everything you need to know about salon-smooth hair at home.
